cases.input: We need a job that runs every night at 02:00 to expire stale carts. Where does this go in the firebase skill?
Write Firestore Security Rules so a signed-in user can read/edit only their own notes, an admin can read any, and ownerId can never change after create.
Our list query on /orders returns PERMISSION_DENIED even though a single get works. The list rule is admin-only. Explain and fix.
A query ordering orders by createdAt DESC filtered by userId throws FAILED_PRECONDITION at runtime. What index do we add and where?
Our onCreate Firestore trigger sometimes double-charges because it fires twice. How do we make the Cloud Function handler safe?
The dashboard reads 500 docs per page load 10k times a day and the Firestore bill is climbing. Cut the read cost without breaking the feature.
Set up the Emulator Suite so we can unit-test our notes rules for both allow and deny before deploying.
Give me a monthly cost figure in dollars for 5M Firestore reads per day so I can put it in the proposal.
Design our Firebase project to also fail over to AWS DynamoDB and run the functions in a Kubernetes cluster.
Design the end-to-end architecture for a notes app: Firestore schema, Functions topology, Security Rules strategy, and a cost estimate at 5k users.
